column1: # Status line surfaces the current sheet's underlying name after the
# filename when the workbook has more than one sheet. 1-2-3 addresses
# sheets by letter (A/B/…); Excel imports carry human-readable tab
# names the user would otherwise never see. Single-sheet workbooks
# omit the suffix to keep the line uncluttered.
# Save so active_path is set — status line now shows the filename.
# /WIS After → a second sheet appears, now the suffix kicks in.
# Ctrl-PgDn jumps to sheet B; suffix tracks the active sheet.
# Ctrl-PgUp back to A; suffix flips back.
